scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run start:dev -w resume-builder-backend" "npm run dev -w resume-builder-frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w resume-builder-backend && npm run build -w resume-builder-frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w resume-builder-backend && npm run lint -w resume-builder-frontend
